source_note: Incident feed uses Pakistan Standard Time. Map points are district-level approximations for reader orientation and should not be treated as precise coordinates.

incidents.title: Intelligence-Based Operation reported in Dera Ismail Khan
incidents.summary: Security forces conducted an intelligence-based operation in the Loni village of Kulachi, Dera Ismail Khan, after receiving reports of terrorist presence. During the operation, security forces killed three terrorists and injured four others. According to sources, security forces have cordoned off the area and intensified a search operation to track down any remaining militants.

incidents.title: IED Recovery / Defusal reported in Kech
incidents.summary: Security forces successfully recovered and neutralized a 20-kilogram explosive device in Turbat district of Balochistan, preventing a major terror incident.

incidents.title: IED / Explosion reported in Tank
incidents.summary: According to local sources, terrorists blew up a Basic Health Unit (BHU) and a Government Middle School for Boys in the Chesan Kach area within the limits of Saddar Police Station in Tank district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa using explosive materials. No casualties were reported in the incident.

incidents.title: Clash / Armed Encounter reported in North Waziristan
incidents.summary: Clashes are ongoing between security forces and armed militants in the Ziraki village area of North Waziristan, according to local reports. Exchanges of heavy gunfire are reportedly continuing in the area. So far, there has been no official statement confirming casualties.

incidents.title: Counterterrorism Operation reported in North Waziristan
incidents.summary: According to Pakistan military media wing Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR), security forces killed 11 terrorists affiliated with the Pakistani Taliban during intelligence-based operations in Datta Khel, North Waziristan, over the last 48 hours.

incidents.title: Targeted Shooting / Attack on Peace Committee reported in Dera Ismail Khan
incidents.category: Targeted Shooting / Attack on Peace Committee
incidents.summary: Unidentified armed men opened fire on members of a peace committee in the Attal Sharif area of Kulachi tehsil, Dera Ismail Khan district in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. According to police, four people were killed.

incidents.title: Suicide Bombing / Explosion reported in Quetta
incidents.summary: A powerful explosion occurred near a paramilitary installation close to a passing train in Quetta, Balochistan, derailing two bogeys. According to police, more than 30 kilograms of explosives were used in the suspected suicide bombing. The death toll has risen to 23, while around 47 others were injured. Rescue operations are still underway, and officials say the figures may rise further. Initial investigations suggest the train had stopped near the installation to attach additional bogeys for families of security personnel returning home for Eid. Most of the casualties were reportedly women and children.

incidents.title: Counterterrorism Operation / Arrests reported in Lahore
incidents.actor: Counter Terrorism Department (CTD) / Pakistani Taliban-linked suspects
incidents.summary: The Counter Terrorism Department (CTD) Punjab arrested 13 suspected terrorists during intelligence-based operations across Punjab. According to officials, the operations were conducted in Lahore, Jhang, Sahiwal, Jhelum, Chiniot, Mandi Bahauddin, and Mianwali. Arms and explosives were also recovered during the raids. The suspects were linked to Fitna al Khawarij (Pakistani Taliban) and other banned groups.

incidents.title: Counterterrorism Operation / Encounter reported in Pishin
incidents.summary: The Balochistan Counter-Terrorism Department (CTD) has claimed to have killed four terrorists in an intense exchange of fire during an operation in the Surkhab refugee camp area, about 20 kilometres from Pishin town. The operation was launched after receiving intelligence about terrorist presence.

incidents.title: Curfew / Security Operation reported in Bajaur
incidents.summary: Security forces have imposed a three-day curfew in Bajaur district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa amid reports of a possible operation. The restrictions apply to the villages of Anga, Shahi Tangi, Nari Tangi, and Shakro in Wara Mamond. Residents have been advised to stay indoors and avoid areas believed to house militant hideouts.

incidents.title: Counterterrorism Operation / Clash reported in Bannu
incidents.summary: According to Bannu Police, a major terror plot was foiled in the Merian area. Eight terrorists were killed during the operation, while one official was martyred and another injured. The Monitoring Desk added that, in official statements, Ittehad-ul-Mujahideen Pakistan (IMP) confirmed the clashes.

incidents.title: IED / Explosion reported in Bannu
incidents.summary: An explosive device allegedly planted by unidentified terrorists detonated at Buda Mir Abbas BHU within the limits of Mandan Police Station in Bannu district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

incidents.title: Clash / Armed Encounter reported in Lakki Marwat
incidents.summary: A clash is underway between the Police Peace Committee and terrorists affiliated with the Pakistani Taliban near Kichi Qamar Lundiwa in Lakki Marwat district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. According to reports, two militants have been killed while commander Kaleem alias Qaima was reportedly injured.

incidents.title: Clash / Armed Encounter reported in Bannu
incidents.actor: Police Peace Committee / Ittehad-ul-Mujahideen Pakistan (IMP) / Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan (TTP)
incidents.summary: Intense clashes are ongoing between the Police Peace Committee and terrorists affiliated with the Pakistani Taliban near the Barkazai area within the limits of Miryan Police Station in Bannu district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

incidents.title: IED Recovery / Defusal reported in North Waziristan
incidents.summary: Bannu Police successfully defused a 10-kilogram remote-controlled explosive device planted near Gul Zaman Mosque on the Bannu–Miranshah Road in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, preventing a major potential attack.

incidents.title: Targeted Killing / Shooting reported in Khyber
incidents.summary: Unknown motorcyclists opened fire on Police Officer Akakhel Shah in the Kalinga Bypass area of Bara, Khyber district in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. According to reports, he was killed on the spot.

incidents.title: Search Operation / Clash reported in Bajaur
incidents.summary: Official sources said a joint search operation is being conducted in parts of Bajaur tribal district following recent attacks. The operation was launched in Tehsil Wada Mamond and surrounding areas. Sources said an exchange of fire also took place between forces and militants in the Inam Khwaru Chenagai area, causing casualties among the militants.

incidents.title: Counterterrorism Operations reported in North Waziristan
incidents.summary: According to Pakistan Military Media Wing Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR), security forces conducted a series of intelligence-based operations in multiple areas of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, including Datta Khel, Spin Wam, and Bannu. Over the last 48 hours, 23 terrorists affiliated with the Pakistani Taliban, including ring leader Jan Meer alias Toor Saqib, were killed during intense exchanges of fire. Weapons, ammunition, explosives, prepared IEDs, underground tunnels, and bunkers were also recovered and destroyed during the operations.

incidents.title: Grenade Attack / Shooting reported in Jhal Magsi
incidents.summary: Terrorists affiliated with Baloch militant groups lobbed grenades and carried out distant firing on three police stations in Jhal Magsi district of Balochistan. According to reports, three civilians were affected in the attack.

incidents.title: Drone / Quadcopter Attack reported in Bajaur
incidents.summary: Two school students lost their lives in a quadcopter strike in the Mamond area of Bajaur district. The children were returning home from school in the Shahi Tangi area when the incident occurred.

incidents.title: Drone / Quadcopter Attack reported in Bajaur
incidents.summary: A quadcopter attack targeted the local population in the Salarzai area of Bajaur district. Police said two civilian children were injured in the attack. The injured children were identified as Rehana and Jawad, and were shifted to the hospital for treatment.

incidents.title: Targeted Killing / Shooting reported in Bajaur
incidents.summary: The Islamic State Khorasan Province (ISKP) has claimed responsibility for an attack on police in Brakho village, Mamond area of Bajaur district in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, in which Police Constable Ilyas was killed.

incidents.title: Drone Attack reported in Dera Ghazi Khan
incidents.summary: Terrorists affiliated with the Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan (TTP) targeted the Chitrota Police Station in the Tunsa Sharif area of Punjab using quadcopter drones. According to reports, explosives dropped from the drones damaged the structure of the building, while no casualties were reported.

incidents.title: Militant Infighting / Clash reported in Kurram
incidents.summary: The Jamaat-ul-Ahrar faction released a statement following clashes in Kurram district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, accusing Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan (TTP) of killing its senior commander Mumtaz Ummati along with 18 militants. The group warned of a strong response to the incident. Earlier, local and police sources confirmed clashes between two armed groups in which 18 militants were killed.
incidents.source: Jamaat-ul-Ahrar Statement / Local and Police Sources

incidents.title: Counterterrorism Operation reported in Quetta
incidents.summary: Security forces killed Bashir, the mastermind behind the 30 September 2025 attack on FC (North) Balochistan Headquarters in Quetta, Balochistan, after a prolonged intelligence operation. According to reports, Bashir was traced following the 14–15 May Shaban operation in which 33 militants were killed. He was later eliminated on 20 May, while one of his associates was arrested alive.

incidents.title: Counterterrorism Operation / Clash reported in North Waziristan
incidents.summary: The proscribed Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan (TTP) confirmed clashes with security forces in the Spin Wam area of North Waziristan district in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. The group admitted that 13 of its members were killed during the operation, including commander Saqib, who was considered a top commander of the TTP.

incidents.title: Counterterrorism Operation reported in North Waziristan
incidents.summary: During a prolonged intelligence operation, security forces killed notorious militant Hazrat Umer alias Jan Mir and Tor Saqib along with four accomplices in Spinwam, North Waziristan district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. According to reports, Hazrat Umer was an important commander of the Pakistani Taliban’s Aleem Khan Khushali group.

incidents.title: Targeted Killing / Shooting reported in Dera Ismail Khan
incidents.summary: Unidentified armed assailants killed Police Officer Abdul Aziz within the limits of Yarak Police Station in Dera Ismail Khan district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

incidents.title: Wildlife Department employee killed in Tank
incidents.summary: TGD reported that Wildlife Department employee Dil Jan was killed by armed militants while performing duties in Wanda Zulu.

incidents.title: Tribal elder killed in Wana Bazaar IED blast
incidents.summary: TGD reported that Malik Tariq, chief of the Ahmadzai Wazir tribe, was killed in an IED blast in Wana Bazaar, with five others injured.

incidents.title: Operation reported in Mangla Zarghoon Gar area
incidents.summary: TGD carried an official update saying an operation launched on May 13 continued for four days, with three commanders taken into custody and 35 operatives killed during recent intelligence-based operations.

incidents.title: Bridge damaged by explosion near Ghazni Khel
incidents.summary: TGD reported that a bridge near Kotka Nazar Shah in Dagar Kili, Ghazni Khel, was severely damaged by an explosion.

incidents.title: Reported quadcopter attacks near Darra Tang
incidents.summary: TGD reported unsuccessful quadcopter attacks near border check posts between Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and Punjab, with no casualties reported.

incidents.title: IBO reported near Dera Ismail Khan-Tank border
incidents.summary: TGD reported an intelligence-based operation in Wanda Zalo village, Malagan, in which four TTP-linked terrorists were killed.

incidents.title: Reported quadcopter strike in Loi Sam, Bajaur
incidents.summary: TGD reported that an unidentified quadcopter strike in the Anzari area of Loi Sam injured six people and killed livestock.
